name: claude-code-history-files-finder
description: >- Searches and recovers Claude Code JSONL history across all active config homes and archives registered in ~/.claude/history-sources.json. Use --all-projects when the project is unknown and --codex to include Codex rollout search. Uses internal timestamps and searches messages, thinking, tool inputs/results, queues, attachments, summaries, titles, and file-history paths. Recovers exact captured bytes from Claude file-history snapshots, including post-Write edits and binary files; otherwise lab
author: daymade
